nodes.label: AI as research assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable source of fabricated specifics
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to research topics such as legislation and best practice in records management

nodes.label: AI as confidential thinking partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as untrustworthy for sensitive situations
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a good substitute to talk through the idea if there is noone around I can talk to, or if the situation is confidential

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary crutch for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to rewrite emails so they sound more professional

nodes.label: AI reliability and factuality
nodes.label_negative: AI hallucination and fabrication of specifics
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to present information in a work environment that is not factually correct

nodes.label: AI use sanctioned by workplace
nodes.label_negative: Workplace snobbishness and resistance toward AI
nodes.grounding_span: I have also found a bit of snobbishness around the use of AI

nodes.label: AI as practical problem solver
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of fabricated information requiring full verification
nodes.grounding_span: I really just use AI to point me in the right direction

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to present information in a work environment that is not factually correct

nodes.label: Confidentiality and trust in sensitive work
nodes.grounding_span: if the situation is confidential and I shouldn't talk to anyone else about it

nodes.label: Effective communication
nodes.grounding_span: It has improved my confidence with communication

nodes.label: Human expertise and emotional intelligence
nodes.grounding_span: My work also requires a fair bit of human experience, handling sensitive situations and peoples emotions

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for email drafting
nodes.grounding_span: I feel satisfied every time I get it to rewrite an email for me!

nodes.label: Frustration with AI fabricating legislation specifics
nodes.grounding_span: I do find it frustrating when the AI quotes specific sections of legislation that do not exist

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
nodes.grounding_span: I would not trust 100% what a model says unfortunately but it does give me the framework

nodes.label: Concern about workplace perception of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like I can be more open and positive about the use of AI

nodes.label: Iterative verification through external sources
nodes.grounding_span: I often ask models to check thoroughly now because I have learnt this gets a more researched response

nodes.label: Experience-driven calibration of trust
nodes.grounding_span: I really just use AI to point me in the right direction. I would not trust 100% what a model says
